schema.name: OpenAIChatCompletions_CL
schema.description: OpenAI Chat Completions data collected from OpenAI Chat Completions API

columns.name: Id
columns.description: The unique identifier for the chat completion

columns.name: ObjectType
columns.description: The object type

columns.name: CreatedAt
columns.description: The Unix timestamp (in seconds) of when the chat completion was created

columns.name: Model
columns.description: The model used for the chat completion

columns.name: RequestId
columns.description: The unique request identifier

columns.name: ServiceTier
columns.description: The processing type used for serving the request

columns.name: SystemFingerprint
columns.description: Backend configuration fingerprint

columns.name: Choices
columns.description: The list of chat completion choices

columns.name: Usage
columns.description: Usage statistics for the completion request

columns.name: Metadata
columns.description: Set of key-value pairs attached to the object

columns.name: ToolChoice
columns.description: Which tool (if any) was called by the model

columns.name: Tools
columns.description: List of tools the model may call

columns.name: Temperature
columns.description: The sampling temperature used

columns.name: TopProbability
columns.description: The nucleus sampling parameter

columns.name: FrequencyPenalty
columns.description: Frequency penalty parameter

columns.name: PresencePenalty
columns.description: Presence penalty parameter

columns.name: Seed
columns.description: The seed used for deterministic sampling

columns.name: InputUser
columns.description: User identifier for the request

columns.name: ResponseFormat
columns.description: The format specification for the response

columns.name: ConnectorName
columns.description: The friendly name of the connector instance that collected this log
